# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this change improves.

## Testing

Explain how you tested the change in Chrome and ChatGPT.

## Privacy and Security

Confirm that this pull request does not include API keys, `.env` files, private user data, or unnecessary permissions.

## Accessibility

Explain whether the change affects language, voice, keyboard use, large text, high contrast, or screen reader support.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or a recording when the change affects the interface.
